title: Raquel Rodriguez | Firm Administrator | Colombo & Hurd
content:
## Director of Firm Administration
Request A Consultation
Ms. Raquel Rodriguez is the Firm Administrator at Colombo & Hurd, PL. She has been with the firm for over a decade and has assisted with nearly all aspects of the firm’s practice, being instrumental to the firm’s impressive growth from the early days of the firm. Ms. Rodriguez is responsible for managing our office, supporting our attorneys and staff and most importantly serving our clients. As a compassionate yet confident leader in our firm, Raquel enjoys guiding both staff and our clients to ensure a smooth transition from the moment a client first contacts Colombo & Hurd to the last communication happily welcoming families and businesses to the United States. Having served thousands of clients at the firm, Raquel understands the difficulties and stress of going through the U.S. immigration process and helps clients navigate these challenges on a day to day basis. As the trusted office manager, Raquel oversees the office operations and is committed to making our client’s and their families experience in our office a positive one. Raquel is proud to incorporate the wealth of knowledge she has gained over the years to equip our legal team to best serve the firm’s clients.
Raquel is most proud of her two children and in her spare time she enjoys spending time with family, baking, decorating, and the outdoors, especially the beach!
